LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 6/8/19, PETITIONER SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS, APPROVED. ORDER APPROVING TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

DECLARATION OF BRENNAN S. NEVILLE IN SUPPORT OF RESPONSE OF SPECIALLY APPEARING INTERESTED PARTY BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEBRASKA TO PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100071480) FILED BY RESPONDENT BERKSHIRE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEBRASKA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 28, 2019. BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEBRASKA STATES THAT ITS AFFILIATED ENTITY (BIFCO) IS WILLING TO GIVE PEDRO S. FAR MORE CONSIDERATION FOR THE ASSIGNMENT THAN SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC. THEREFORE, IT IS PRESENTLY NOT APPARENT WHETHER THE TRANSFER OF THE STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT "IS IN THE BEST INTEREST OF THE PAYEE." (INS. CODE 10139.5(A)(1). THE PETITION FOR APPROVAL IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW PEDRO S. TO EXPLORE THIS OTHER OPTION. PETITIONER AND BERKSHIRE HAVE LEAVE TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS BY JUNE 21, 2019. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT STATES IT IS INCLINED TO GRANT THE PETITION, AND COUNSEL IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric Will, esq. (916-438-1819) of Eason & Tambornini for Petitioner, Sequoia Companies via Court Call.
Eugene a Ahtirski, esq. (818-786-2176) for and with Respondent, Pedro Saavedra (818-476-9748) via Court Call.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is Taken Under Submission. The Court states it is inclined to grant the petition, and Counsel is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Continued To Jun-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Erin Scharg, Esq., Eason & Tambornini, A Law Corporation, Telephone appearing for Plaintiff, (CourtCall);
Pedro S., appearing on his own behalf as respondent;
No other apearances.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SEQUOIA COMPANIES, LLC'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights

CONTINUED to June 28, 2019. Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Nebraska states that its affiliated entity (BIFCO) is willing to give Pedro S. far more consideration for the assignment than Sequoia Companies, LLC. Therefore, it is presently not apparent whether the transfer of the structured settlement "is in the best interest of the payee." (Ins. Code 10139.5(a)(1). The petition for approval is CONTINUED to allow Pedro S. to explore this other option. Petitioner and Berkshire have leave to file supplemental briefs by June 21, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
